name: fluiddocs-deck-builder
description: Open-source deck builder. Drop in a PDF or PPTX, get back a polished interactive HTML deck. 5 type-correct deck types (pitch, sales, launch, keynote, all-hands), 8 templates, PDF and PPTX import, inline editing, multi-reviewer quality pipeline.

skills.name: deck-builder
skills.description: Core pipeline. Handles canvas, shell, reviewer specs, brand methodology. Invoked by every type pack.

skills.name: deck-pitch
skills.description: 14-slide pitch deck builder with 4 brand-mirror templates (Airbnb, Stripe, Anthropic, Sequoia Classic).

skills.name: deck-import
skills.description: Convert any PDF or PPTX deck into a clean, branded, interactive HTML deck.

skills.name: deck-critique-lite
skills.description: 5 to 7 plain-language observations on a pitch deck. No numerical score.

commands.name: deck-builder
commands.description: Start building any deck (pitch, sales, launch, keynote, all-hands).
